lines.en_lit: The verse states: and he shall place the burnt-offering upon it” and Rava said: the burnt-offering it ascends first.
And the griddle-cake libations category meal-offering.
And libations additional offerings, Offerings and libations, And the additional offerings the vessels But wasn’t it taught The vessels precede the additional offerings? is tanna’im
Abaye said: reasonable in accordance with the one who said the additional offerings the vessels didn’t you say In the morning, in the morning, to prioritize Here too, on day, on day” postpone
What is the rationale of the one who said: vessels precede the additional offerings? he derives: Statute, from: Statute, griddle-cake
If he derived it from there, let him derive the entire matter from there, to that on day, on day,” is effective, to postpone
The morning incense was burned between blood of the limbs. whose If the Rabbis should between blood and lamps. If Abba Shaul, should between lamps and of limbs.
Actually, is the Rabbis, but is not speaking of the sequence

afternoon between limbs libations. From where are these matters Rabbi Yoḥanan said verse states: as the meal-offering in the morning and its libation, you shall present it, Just as the morning meal-offering incense precedes libations, so too here, incense precedes the libations.

If just as there, incense precedes limbs, so too here, incense precede limbs. Is it written: As the limbs in the morning? As the meal-offering in the morning, is written, like the meal-offering in the morning, and not like the limbs of the morning.
The Sages taught “And its libation shall be a quarter-hin one will derive of morning from of afternoon
